ddls:
CREATE TABLE "format_specifiers" (
  "specifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format specifier */,
  "specifier_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the format specifier (e.g., G, y, M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format specifier */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the format specifier */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the specifier can be customized by users */,
  "supported_calendars" TEXT /* Array of supported calendar systems (e.g., Gregorian, ISO 8601) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_time_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date and time format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the date and time format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the date and time format */,
  "specifier_ids" TEXT /* Array of format specifier IDs used in this format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the format is a default format */,
  "supported_cultures" TEXT /* Array of supported cultures (e.g., en-US, fr-FR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_time_formats_specifier_ids FOREIGN KEY ("specifier_ids") REFERENCES format_specifiers ("specifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultural_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural setting */,
  "culture_name" TEXT /* Name of the culture */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date and time format used in this culture and region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone associated with the culture and region */,
  "day_start" TEXT /* Time when the day starts (e.g., 00:00 for midnight) */,
  "day_end" TEXT /* Time when the day ends (e.g., 23:59 for the end of the day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultural_settings_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES date_time_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_customizations" (
  "customization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user customization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this customization */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date and time format used in this customization */,
  "specifier_ids" TEXT /* Array of format specifier IDs used in this customization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customization is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_customizations_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES date_time_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_customizations_specifier_ids FOREIGN KEY ("specifier_ids") REFERENCES format_specifiers ("specifier_id")
)
